LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT THE ALLEN COMPANY, INC. PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT THE ALLEN COMPANY, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS UNDER HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WARNING THAT IS REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 25249.5-25249.14; THE AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IS REASONABLE UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; AND THE PENALTY AMOUNT (WHICH IS $1,000, NOT $5,000 AS MISTAKENLY INDICATED ON PAGE 9 OF THE MEMORANDUM) IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(B)(2). ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Williams Sonoma, Inc.
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Williams Sonoma, Inc.

GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-25-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant The Allen Company, Inc.
Off Calendar May-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant The Allen Company, Inc.

Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and for entry of consent judgment as to Defendant The Allen Company, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed, and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount (which is $1,000, not $5,000 as mistakenly indicated on page 9 of the memorandum) is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
